max_level.title: Reach maximum power level in the Immersive Enchanting skill tree

full_bookshelves.title: Have 15 Chiseled Bookshelves with Ancient Books fully surrounding your table

master_enchant.title: Apply a Tier IV enchantment to a piece of gear

description: You are using knowledge accumulated by people who came before
and left it where you could find it.
The Ancient Books did not generate randomly.
Someone wrote them. Someone placed them in those chests.
That was not chance — it was intent.
Use the enchantments like they were intended.
Efficiency IV on the right tool. Protection IV on the right armor.
Do not waste what took someone else everything to know.
This is the enchanting table the previous civilizations used.
It was waiting here. Now it's yours.
→ Reach maximum power in the skill tree [check]
→ Place 15 Chiseled Bookshelves with Ancient Books [check]
→ Apply a Tier IV enchantment to a piece of gear [check]
